title: Brostastic 16x
description: The pack I made for Brostastic, a German YouTuber with 13.2k subscribers. It includes an orange and a default recolor.
body: This is a PvP themed packed I made for Brostastic, a German YouTuber. It includes new textures for all the relevant pvp items, like all of the tools, armor models and items, the ingots and diamonds/emeralds, the corresponding blocks, the bow, the rod, the fireball and the enderpearl. You can also choose between an orange recolor with orange diamonds, ender pearl and gui or a default recolor where diamonds ender pearls and the gui are in the same color as in vanilla minecraft. The pack is supposed to make the game look more appealing especially to those who have specialiced in Minecraft PvP.
